description: Use this API to return an array of complex values for subsystem two-winding transformers. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.2.0. ierr, xarray = atrncplx(sid, owner, ties, flag, entry, string)
python_syntax: ierr, xarray = atrncplx(sid, owner, ties, flag, entry, string)

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: Defines the bus subsystem to be used. (input; -1 by default).

parameters.name: owner
parameters.description: A flag indicating owner usage if ownership is a subsystem selection criterion (ignored if sid is negative). (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: ties
parameters.description: A flag indicating which subsystem two-winding transformers to include (ignored if sid is negative). (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: flag
parameters.description: A flag indicating which subsystem two-winding transformers to include. (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: entry
parameters.description: A flag indicating organization. (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: string
parameters.description: An array of NSTR elements specifying NSTR of the following strings indicating the transformer quantities desired. (input; no default allowed).

return_values.name: xarray
return_values.description: An array of NSTR*DIM elements specifying Is an array of at least NSTR columns, each of which contains DIM elements. (output).

sid.description: to instruct the API to assume a subsystem containing all buses in the working case.
valid bus subsystem identifier. Valid subsystem identifiers range from 0 to 11. Subsystem SID must have been previously defined.

ties.description: for interior subsystem two-winding transformers only.
for subsystem tie two-winding transformers only.
for both interior subsystem and tie two-winding transformers.

entry.description: for double entry (each branch in both directions).

string.description: Actual transformer impedance in pu.
Actual transformer impedance in units governed by CZ.
Nominal transformer impedance in pu.
Nominal transformer impedance in units governed by CZ.
Magnetizing admittance in pu.
Magnetizing admittance in units governed by CM.
Load drop compensation impedance in pu.
Zero sequence branch impedance in pu.
ZGRND’ Zero sequence winding 1 grounding impedance in pu.
Zero sequence winding 1 grounding impedance in units governed by CZG.
‘ZGRND2’ Zero sequence winding 2 grounding impedance in pu.
Zero sequence winding 2 grounding impedance in units governed by CZG.
Zero sequence leakage impedance connected to the winding 1 bus in pu.
Zero sequence leakage impedance connected to the winding 1 bus in units governed by CZ0.
Zero sequence leakage impedance connected to the winding 2 bus in pu.
Zero sequence leakage impedance connected to the winding 2 bus in units governed by CZ0.
Zero sequence common neutral grounding impedance in pu.
Zero sequence common neutral grounding impedance in units governed by CZG.
P + j Q flow at from bus end.
Losses (MW and Mvar).
P + j Q flow at from bus end (units determined by power output options).
Losses (units determined by power output options).

error_codes.description: DIM, and hence the size of XARRAY, is not large enough.
Sequence data not in case (when STRING = ‘RXZERO’, ‘ZGRND’, ‘ZGRND2’, ‘ZG1’, ‘ZG1CZG’, ‘ZG2’, ‘ZG2CZG’, ‘Z01’, ‘Z01CZ0’, ‘Z02’, ‘Z02CZ0’, ‘ZNUTRL’, or ‘ZNUTRLCZG’).
